goals.description: Double down on the venting session with cohort_3 and teammate_A about the professor's 'impossible standards' until we've laughed enough to forget the deadline exists.
goals.rationale: Affiliation (0.5) is my absolute core; if I stop talking to them now, I feel like I'm dying. The deadline passed hours ago (Mon 13:30), so worrying about it is stupid. My impulsive nature says 'burn it all down' rather than fix a broken system that doesn't value us.

goals.rationale: My planning horizon is zero for anything beyond this hour. Checking email breaks the dopamine flow of the group bond. If the grade suffers, it suffers later—I can't deal with future consequences right now when I need connection.

goals.description: Aggressively reject the idea of submitting the assignment now just because it's '90% done'. It feels like a trap designed to ruin our vibe.
goals.rationale: The assertiveness axis makes me want to fight back against the pressure, but the impulse to just walk away is stronger. Submitting it now feels like giving in to the 'system'. I'll do it later or never; right now, the relationship network is the only thing that matters.
